directive.title: Mobile Responsive — Charts and Data Visualizations

auditor.summary: The build implements the core ResponsiveChartWrapper component and MobileChartConfig configuration as specified, but fails to meet several critical acceptance criteria. Only 11 of 14 dashboard pages were modified (missing page.tsx, log-response/page.tsx, send-rfq/page.tsx). The legend layout uses 'horizontal' instead of the required 'vertical' stacking. No unit tests or Playwright tests were created to verify the acceptance criteria. The tooltip wrapping approach may break Recharts' internal DOM structure. Several type safety issues exist in the component identification logic. The build is incomplete and requires significant fixes before it can pass audit. Score is 40 due to multiple critical failures on acceptance criteria and missing test infrastructure.

top_issues.description: Missing 3 dashboard page modifications: app/dashboard/page.tsx, app/dashboard/log-response/page.tsx, app/dashboard/send-rfq/page.tsx. The build spec requires all 14 dashboard pages to have chart components wrapped in ResponsiveChartWrapper. Only 11 pages were modified.

Legend layout is set to 'horizontal' instead of 'vertical' as specified in the build spec. The spec requires `<Legend layout='vertical' verticalAlign='bottom' align='center' />` on mobile, but the code uses `layout: 'horizontal'`. This will cause legends to render in a single row instead of stacked vertically, potentially causing overflow on narrow viewports.

The tooltip wrapper div is returned as a separate element with key="tooltip-wrapper" inside the processedChildren array, but it wraps the Tooltip component. This creates an extra DOM node that may break Recharts' tooltip positioning logic. The Tooltip should be wrapped at the ResponsiveChartWrapper level, not inside the children mapping.
